creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On a 12-BETA1 jail poudriere fails to package port graphics/gimp-app (ports tree at revision 482909) with the following error:

[...]
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: package        >============================
===>  Building package for gimp-app-2.10.6_1,1
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/gimp-app/work/stage/usr/local/<<<<<<< .mine:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/gimp-app/work/stage/usr/local/libexec/gimp/2.2/plug-ins/web-page/web-page:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/gimp-app/work/stage/usr/local/||||||| .r481973:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/gimp-app/work/stage/usr/local/=======:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/gimp-app/work/stage/usr/local/>>>>>>> .r482108:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1
